THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIZANI DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC. PLTF SHALL NOT EXECUTE ON WRIT FOR POSSESSION IF DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS ON AMOUNT DUE. IF DEFAULT, PLTF MAY FILE DECLARATION TO OBTAIN IMMEDIATE WRIT. SEE STIPULATION FOR TERMS OF SETTLEMENT.
